text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking around town on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gah! The hell is with this game?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Give me a break. What happened to that
confidence you had a minute ago?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you. Ama dragged me into this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! This racing game's really popular at the
dorm...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And Brian likes these kinds of heated
competitions, so I brought her along.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You wanna give it a go? Brian's pretty good!
choice_data_list: Sure, I'll give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...All right. I'll race you, but you better put up a
good fight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, we start playing the racing game...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
You think you can get away?! I'm gonna tear you
to shreds!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Looks like you're slowin' down! You
losing your focus?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's speed slows, her assault pausing for
just a moment. And then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: A feint?! You passed me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! What was that technique just now?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. I guess that trainer title isn't just for show,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Assess your own abilities and build a racing style
from there... I approve.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing! Just what exactly did you even
do?
choice_data_list: I just took advantage of my explosive power.
I just took a little breather.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Oh? So you bet on having a burst of speed for
that single moment?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I see! This ended up being more fun than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. Who said we're finished?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? You wanna keep playing?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Things are finally getting fun. I'm going to bring
devastating speed to the next race and tear right
through you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's focus on speed ends up bringing
undeniable results. It seems today has been a
good change of pace!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Conserving your energy while also luring your prey into complacency...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I guess there are things in games you can
apply to real races.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. I feel like we can really get our blood
pumping.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Amazon, we're heading back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong? You so fired up that the game isn't
enough anymore?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If it's a challenge you want, I accept! But things
won't go as smoothly as the game for you!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... If there's no challenge, it's not worth
doing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the partner running that follows, it appears
Narita Brian has already managed to add the new
insights to her arsenal.
